boards.greenhouse.io.notes: Wallapop form uses react-select dropdowns and input[id^='question_'] for custom questions. Must target by label 'for' attribute, not generic selector. reCAPTCHA v3 badge present — may block headless. FREE NOW job was expired.

jobs.lever.co.notes: hCaptcha (visual image-selection) appears on form submission — cannot solve headlessly. Also has many custom questions (notice period, salary, right-to-work, UK commute). Requires manual submission.
